events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: Sending out a huge shout to Sir Brian May, celebrating his 79th birthday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Milestone
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your go-to Stones track to get you dancing?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: MTV's Big Debut
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? It all started on this day 45 years ago with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was originally released on August 29, 1994, making this year its 32nd anniversary.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Throwback
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! Which track still gives you that 90s swagger?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York, becoming a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. If you could have been there, which artist would you have most wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll,' Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On the 49th anniversary of his passing, we're remembering Elvis Presley. What's your favourite song from The King?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK and October 1, 1969, in the US, marking its 57th anniversary this year.

angles.name: Stroll Down Abbey Road
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The album cover is legendary, but which track is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid, Liam Gallagher, is 54 today! What's the ultimate Liam-era track that gets you singing along?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and the album followed shortly after, marking its 55th anniversary this year.

angles.name: Imagine 55 Years
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. What does this timeless anthem mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music and marking its 25th anniversary this year.

angles.name: iPod Quarter Century
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Today marks 25 years since Apple dropped the original, changing how we listen to music forever! What was on your first playlist?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is officially James Bond Day, commemorating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' on this date in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Grab your martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) and tell us your favourite 007 film or iconic Bond moment.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. What's his most impactful song for you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album,' was released on November 22, 1968, marking its 58th anniversary this year.

angles.name: White Album 58 Years
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles gave us the iconic 'White Album'. Which track from that legendary double LP is your absolute favourite?
